title: Botswana Open University: Subsidiary Legislation(previously "botswana College of Distance and Open Learning")
title_en: Botswana Open University: Subsidiary Legislation(previously "botswana College of Distance and Open Learning")

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Regulations may be cited as the Botswana College of Distance and Open Learning Regulations.

provisions.title: Committees of the Board
